title: Xbox is bringing games from its original console to PC - Engadget
summary: While the required specs are fairly modest (some of these games are a quarter-century old, after all), you'll need to be running Windows 11 to play these games on PC. "This marks the beginning of a broader effort to preserve Xbox games…
